title: Path traversal / sandbox escape in file-search agent middleware glob_search
description: The file-search agent middleware exposes glob_search/grep tools confined to a configured root_path. glob_search() validates only the starting directory (path) via _validate_and_resolve_path() but then expands the caller-supplied glob pattern with base_full.glob(pattern). pathlib.Path.glob expands '..' components against the base directory, so a pattern like '../../etc/passwd' yields files outside the configured root, and the per-match filter only checks match.is_file() without resolving symlinks or confirming the resolved path is inside root_path. As a result an agent acting on untrusted input (or untrusted workspace contents) can disclose file contents outside the intended sandbox, via traversal patterns or in-root symlinks pointing outside the root.
